roles.name: Clockmaker
roles.summary: You start knowing how many steps from the Demon to its nearest Minion.
roles.chineseSummary: 首夜：得知恶魔与最近爪牙之间相隔几步。
roles.detail: First night only. Learn the distance between the Demon and the nearest Minion.
roles.chineseDetail: 仅首夜获知恶魔到最近爪牙的座位距离。

roles.name: Dreamer
roles.summary: Each night, choose a player: you learn 1 good and 1 evil character, one of which is correct.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：选择一名玩家，得知 1 个善良角色和 1 个邪恶角色，其中 1 个正确。
roles.detail: Wake each night and choose a player. The Storyteller shows one good and one evil character, with one matching the target.
roles.chineseDetail: 每晚查看一名玩家，并在一个善良角色与一个邪恶角色之间得到真假混合信息。

roles.name: Snake Charmer
roles.summary: Each night, choose a player: if they are the Demon, you swap characters and alignments.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：选择一名玩家。若其是恶魔，你们交换角色与阵营。
roles.detail: Choose a player each night. If they are the Demon, you become the Demon and they become the Snake Charmer.
roles.chineseDetail: 每晚指定一名玩家；若其是恶魔，则你们交换角色和阵营。

roles.name: Mathematician
roles.summary: Each night, learn how many players' abilities worked abnormally today or tonight.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：得知今天或今夜有多少玩家的能力异常生效。
roles.detail: Wake each night and learn a number reflecting unusual ability resolution.
roles.chineseDetail: 每晚得到一个数字，代表今天或今夜有多少角色能力异常生效。

roles.name: Flowergirl
roles.summary: Each night*, learn if the Demon voted today.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：得知恶魔今天是否投过票。
roles.detail: On nights after the first, learn whether the Demon cast a vote during the day.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜后每晚得知恶魔白天是否投票。

roles.name: Town Crier
roles.summary: Each night*, learn if a Minion nominated today.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：得知今天是否有爪牙发起提名。
roles.detail: On nights after the first, learn whether any Minion made a nomination during the day.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜后每晚得知白天是否有爪牙提出提名。

roles.name: Oracle
roles.summary: Each night*, learn how many dead players are evil.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：得知死去玩家中有多少是邪恶。
roles.detail: On nights after the first, learn how many dead players are evil.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜后每晚得知死者中邪恶玩家的数量。

roles.name: Savant
roles.summary: Each day, you may get 2 statements: 1 is true and 1 is false.
roles.chineseSummary: 每天：你可以获得两条陈述，其中一真一假。
roles.detail: Daytime information role. The Storyteller offers two statements, one true and one false.
roles.chineseDetail: 白天由说书人给出两条陈述，一真一假，需自行辨别。

roles.name: Seamstress
roles.summary: Once per game, at night, choose 2 players: you learn if they are the same alignment.
roles.chineseSummary: 每局一次，夜里：选择两名玩家，得知他们是否同阵营。
roles.detail: One-shot night ability. Pick two players and learn whether their alignments match.
roles.chineseDetail: 一次性夜晚指定两名玩家，得知他们阵营是否相同。

roles.name: Philosopher
roles.summary: Once per game, at night, choose a good character: gain that ability. If it is in play, that player is drunk.
roles.chineseSummary: 每局一次，夜里：选择一个善良角色并获得其能力；若该角色在场，则其醉酒。
roles.detail: One-shot night choice. The Philosopher gains a chosen good character's ability; if that character is in play, they become drunk.
roles.chineseDetail: 一次性夜里选择一个善良角色来获得其能力；若该角色在场，则其醉酒。

roles.name: Artist
roles.summary: Once per game, during the day, ask any yes/no question.
roles.chineseSummary: 每局一次，白天：提出任意一个是/否问题。
roles.detail: One-shot daytime question. The Storyteller answers honestly.
roles.chineseDetail: 一次性白天向说书人提出任意一个是/否问题，获得真实回答。

roles.name: Juggler
roles.summary: On your first day, publicly guess up to 5 players' characters. That night, you learn how many are correct.
roles.chineseSummary: 第一天白天：公开猜最多 5 名玩家的角色；当夜得知猜对了几个。
roles.detail: The Juggler makes public guesses during the day, then learns a number that night.
roles.chineseDetail: 第一天公开猜最多 5 人的角色；当夜得知猜中几个。

roles.name: Sage
roles.summary: If the Demon kills you, you learn that it is 1 of 2 players.
roles.chineseSummary: 若被恶魔杀死：得知两名玩家，其中一人是恶魔。
roles.detail: If the Sage dies by the Demon, wake and learn two players, one of whom is the Demon.
roles.chineseDetail: 若被恶魔所杀，则在夜里获知两名玩家，其中一人是恶魔。

roles.name: Mutant
roles.summary: If you are mad about being an Outsider, you might be executed.
roles.chineseSummary: 若你因自己是外来者而发疯失控，可能会被处决。
roles.detail: Passive drawback. If the Mutant breaks madness about being an Outsider, the Storyteller may execute them.
roles.chineseDetail: 变种人若在发疯约束下暴露自己是外来者，可能会被说书人处决。

roles.name: Sweetheart
roles.summary: When you die, 1 player is drunk from now on.
roles.chineseSummary: 当你死亡时，一名玩家从此醉酒。
roles.detail: When the Sweetheart dies, one player becomes drunk permanently.
roles.chineseDetail: 死亡时会让一名玩家永久醉酒，由说书人决定。

roles.name: Barber
roles.summary: If you die, the Demon may swap 2 players' characters.
roles.chineseSummary: 当你死亡时，恶魔可以交换两名玩家的角色。
roles.detail: On the Barber's death, the Demon may force a character swap between two players.
roles.chineseDetail: 理发师死亡后，恶魔可要求交换两名玩家的角色身份。

roles.name: Klutz
roles.summary: When you learn that you died by execution, publicly choose 1 alive player: if they are evil, your team loses.
roles.chineseSummary: 当你得知自己被处决而死后，公开选择一名存活玩家；若其是邪恶，善良输。
roles.detail: On execution death, the Klutz must choose a living player. If that player is evil, good loses.
roles.chineseDetail: 被处决死亡后必须公开点一名存活玩家；若其为邪恶，善良立刻失败。

roles.name: Evil Twin
roles.summary: You and an opposing player know each other. If the good twin dies, evil wins. If the evil twin dies, good can't lose.
roles.chineseSummary: 你与一名对立阵营玩家互知。若善良双子死亡，邪恶赢；若邪恶双子死亡，善良不会输。
roles.detail: First night only. The Evil Twin and a good player learn each other. The game is constrained until one dies.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜互知。只要双子都活着，胜负会受其存亡强烈影响。

roles.name: Witch
roles.summary: Each night, choose a player. If they nominate tomorrow, they die.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：选择一名玩家。若其明天提名，则立刻死亡。
roles.detail: Choose a player each night. If that player nominates the next day, they die immediately.
roles.chineseDetail: 每晚指定一名玩家；若其明天提名，就会因女巫诅咒而死。

roles.name: Cerenovus
roles.summary: Each night, choose a player & a good character: they are mad they are that character tomorrow, or might be executed.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚：选择一名玩家与一个善良角色；其明天必须对该角色发疯，否则可能被处决。
roles.detail: Choose a player and a good character each night. The target must act mad as that character the next day.
roles.chineseDetail: 每晚指定一名玩家及一个善良角色；目标第二天必须对该角色发疯，否则可能被处决。

roles.name: Pit-Hag
roles.summary: Each night*, choose a player & a character they become. If not in play, the Demon may make an extra death.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：选择一名玩家及其将变成的角色。若合法则其转变；恶魔可能额外造成死亡。
roles.detail: On nights after the first, transform a player into a chosen character if legal. Storyteller resolves extra deaths if needed.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜后每晚可让一名玩家变成另一个角色；若出现非法局面，说书人以额外死亡等方式修正。

roles.name: Fang Gu
roles.summary: Each night*, choose a player: they die. The 1st Outsider this kills becomes an evil Fang Gu & you die instead. [+1 Outsider]
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：选择一名玩家死亡。第一次被你杀死的外来者会转成邪恶方固，而你改为死亡。[+1 外来者]
roles.detail: Night kill except the first. The first Outsider killed by the Fang Gu becomes the new evil Fang Gu, and the old one dies. Setup adds one Outsider.
roles.chineseDetail: 开局要额外加入 1 名外来者。首个被方固杀死的外来者会转为新的邪恶方固，而旧方固死亡。

roles.name: Vigormortis
roles.summary: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Minions you kill keep their ability and poison their Townsfolk neighbors.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：选择一名玩家死亡。被你杀死的爪牙保留能力，并毒化其相邻镇民。
roles.detail: Night kill except the first. Killed Minions retain ability and may poison Townsfolk neighbors per Storyteller resolution.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜后每晚杀一人；被其杀死的爪牙依旧保留能力，并毒化相邻镇民。

roles.name: No Dashii
roles.summary: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Your 2 Townsfolk neighbors are poisoned.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：选择一名玩家死亡。你的两侧镇民邻座会中毒。
roles.detail: Night kill except the first. The No Dashii poisons its two Townsfolk neighbors while alive.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜后每晚杀一人；其两侧镇民邻座持续中毒。

roles.name: Vortox
roles.summary: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Townsfolk info is false. Good must execute each day or evil wins.
roles.chineseSummary: 每晚（首夜除外）：选择一名玩家死亡。镇民信息全错；善良每天必须处决，否则邪恶立胜。
roles.detail: Night kill except the first. While alive, all Townsfolk information is false, and good must execute daily to avoid instant loss.
roles.chineseDetail: 首夜后每晚杀一人；镇民信息全部为假，且善良每天必须处决，否则邪恶立刻获胜。
